verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ الٓمٓ
verses.text: Alif Lām Mīm.

verses.quran_arabic: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْكِتَٰبُ لَا رَيْبَ ۛ فِيهِ ۛ هُدًۭى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: That is the Book – (there is) no doubt about it – a guidance for the ones who guard (themselves),

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنَٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
verses.text: who believe in the unseen, and observe the prayer, and contribute from what We have provided them,

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: and who believe in what has been sent down to you, and what was sent down before you, and they are certain of the Hereafter.

verses.quran_arabic: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًۭى مِّن رَّبِّهِمْ ۖ وَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
verses.text: Those (stand) on guidance from their Lord, and those – they are the ones who prosper.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Surely those who disbelieve – (it is) the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them. They will not believe.

verses.quran_arabic: خَتَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ ۖ وَعَلَىٰٓ أَبْصَٰرِهِمْ غِشَٰوَةٌۭ ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌۭ
verses.text: God has set a seal on their hearts and on their hearing, and on their sight (there is) a covering. For them (there is) a great punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ مَن يَقُولُ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَبِٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْءَاخِرِ وَمَا هُم بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: (There are) some people who say, ‘We believe in God and in the Last Day,’ but they are not believers.

verses.quran_arabic: يُخَٰدِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَمَا يَخْدَعُونَ إِلَّآ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: They try to deceive God and the believers, but they only deceive themselves, though they do not realize (it).

canonical_variants.arabic: يُخَٰدِعُونَ اَ۬للَّهَ وَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَمَا يُخَٰدِعُونَ إِلَّآ أَنفُسَهُمۡ وَمَا يَشۡعُرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: They try to deceive Allah and those who have attained faith, yet they try to deceive none but themselves, but they are unaware.

canonical_variants.arabic: يُخَٰدِعُونَ اَ۬للَّهَ وَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَمَا يُخَٰدِعُونَ إِلَّا أَنفُسَهُمۡ  وَمَا يَشۡعُرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: They try to deceive Allah and those who have attained faith, yet they try to deceive none but themselves, but they are unaware.

canonical_variants.arabic: يُخَٰدِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَمَا يُخَٰدِعُونَ إِلَّا أَنفُسَهُمُۥ وَمَا يَشۡعُرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: They try to deceive Allah and those who have attained faith, yet they try to deceive none but themselves, but they are unaware.

canonical_variants.arabic: يُخَٰدِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَمَا يُخَٰدِعُونَ إِلَّا أَنفُسَهُمُۥ وَمَا يَشۡعُرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: They try to deceive Allah and those who have attained faith, yet they try to deceive none but themselves, but they are unaware.

canonical_variants.arabic: يُخَٰدِعُونَ اَ۬للَّهَ وَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَمَا يُخَٰدِعُونَ إِلَّا أَنفُسَهُمْ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: They try to deceive Allah and those who have attained faith, yet they try to deceive none but themselves, but they are unaware.

canonical_variants.arabic: يُخَٰدِعُونَ اَ۬للَّهَ وَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۖ وَمَا يُخَٰدِعُونَ إِلَّآ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: They try to deceive Allah and those who have attained faith, yet they try to deceive none but themselves, but they are unaware.

verses.quran_arabic: فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌۭ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضًۭا ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْذِبُونَ
verses.text: In their hearts is a sickness, so God has increased their sickness, and for them (there is) a painful punishment because they have lied.

canonical_variants.arabic: فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٞ فَزَادَهُمُ اُ۬للَّهُ مَرَضٗاۖ وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمُۢ بِمَا كَانُواْ يُكَذِّبُونَ
canonical_variants.english: In their hearts is sickness, so Allah increased their sickness, and for them is a painful punishment on account of how they used to disbelieve.

canonical_variants.arabic: فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٞ فَزَادَهُمُ اُ۬للَّهُ مَرَضٗاۖ  وَلَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمُۢ بِمَا كَانُواْ يُكَذِّبُونَ
canonical_variants.english: In their hearts is sickness, so Allah increased their sickness, and for them is a painful punishment on account of how they used to disbelieve.

canonical_variants.arabic: فِي قُلُوبِهِمُۥ مَرَضٞ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضٗاۖ وَلَهُمُۥ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمُۢ بِمَا كَانُواْ يُكَذِّبُونَ
canonical_variants.english: In their hearts is sickness, so Allah increased their sickness, and for them is a painful punishment on account of how they used to disbelieve.

canonical_variants.arabic: فِي قُلُوبِهِمُۥ مَرَضٞ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضٗاۖ وَلَهُمُۥ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمُۢ بِمَا كَانُواْ يُكَذِّبُونَ
canonical_variants.english: In their hearts is sickness, so Allah increased their sickness, and for them is a painful punishment on account of how they used to disbelieve.

canonical_variants.arabic: فِے قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٞ فَزَادَهُمُ اُ۬للَّهُ مَرَضاٗۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمُۢ بِمَا كَانُواْ يُكَذِّبُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: In their hearts is sickness, so Allah increased their sickness, and for them is a painful punishment on account of how they used to disbelieve.

canonical_variants.arabic: فِے قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٞۖ فَزَادَهُمُ اُ۬للَّهُ مَرَضاٗۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ اَلِيمُۢ بِمَا كَانُواْ يُكَذِّبُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: In their hearts is sickness, so Allah increased their sickness, and for them is a painful punishment on account of how they used to disbelieve.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَا تُفْسِدُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ مُصْلِحُونَ
verses.text: When it is said to them, ‘Do not foment corruption on the earth,’ they say, ‘We are setting (things) right.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْسِدُونَ وَلَٰكِن لَّا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: Is it not a fact that they – they are the ones who foment corruption, though they do not realize (it)?

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ ءَامِنُوا۟ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلنَّاسُ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ ۗ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ وَلَٰكِن لَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: When it is said to them, ‘Believe as the people believe,’ they say, ‘Shall we believe as the fools believe?’ Is it not a fact that they – they are the fools, but they do not know (it)?

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا لَقُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا وَإِذَا خَلَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ شَيَٰطِينِهِمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا مَعَكُمْ إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ مُسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: When they meet those who believe, they say, ‘We believe,’ but when they go privately to their satans, they say, ‘Surely we are with you. We were only mocking.’

verses.quran_arabic: ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَهْزِئُ بِهِمْ وَيَمُدُّهُمْ فِى طُغْيَٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
verses.text: God will mock them, and increase them in their insolent transgression, wandering blindly.

verses.quran_arabic: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱشْتَرَوُا۟ ٱلضَّلَٰلَةَ بِٱلْهُدَىٰ فَمَا رَبِحَت تِّجَٰرَتُهُمْ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُهْتَدِينَ
verses.text: Those are the ones who have purchased error with the (price of) guidance. Their transaction has not profited (them), and they have not been (rightly) guided.

verses.quran_arabic: مَثَلُهُمْ كَمَثَلِ ٱلَّذِى ٱسْتَوْقَدَ نَارًۭا فَلَمَّآ أَضَآءَتْ مَا حَوْلَهُۥ ذَهَبَ ٱللَّهُ بِنُورِهِمْ وَتَرَكَهُمْ فِى ظُلُمَٰتٍۢ لَّا يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: Their parable is like the parable of the one who kindled a fire. When it lit up what was around him, God took away their light, and left them in darkness – they do not see.

verses.quran_arabic: صُمٌّۢ بُكْمٌ عُمْىٌۭ فَهُمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: Without hearing or speech or sight – so they do not return.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوْ كَصَيِّبٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فِيهِ ظُلُمَٰتٌۭ وَرَعْدٌۭ وَبَرْقٌۭ يَجْعَلُونَ أَصَٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِم مِّنَ ٱلصَّوَٰعِقِ حَذَرَ ٱلْمَوْتِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ مُحِيطٌۢ بِٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: Or (it is) like a cloudburst from the sky, with darkness and thunder and lightning. They put their fingers in their ears because of the thunderbolts, afraid of death – God surrounds the disbelievers.

verses.quran_arabic: يَكَادُ ٱلْبَرْقُ يَخْطَفُ أَبْصَٰرَهُمْ ۖ كُلَّمَآ أَضَآءَ لَهُم مَّشَوْا۟ فِيهِ وَإِذَآ أَظْلَمَ عَلَيْهِمْ قَامُوا۟ ۚ وَلَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَذَهَبَ بِسَمْعِهِمْ وَأَبْصَٰرِهِمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌۭ
verses.text: The lightning almost takes away their sight. Whenever it flashes for them, they walk in it, but when it becomes dark over them, they stand (still). If God (so) pleased, He could indeed take away their hearing and their sight. Surely God is powerful over everything.

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: People! Serve your Lord, who created you and those who were before you, so that you may guard (yourselves).

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فِرَٰشًۭا وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بِنَآءًۭ وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ رِزْقًۭا لَّكُمْ ۖ فَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًۭا وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: (He it is) who made the earth as a couch for you, and the sky a dome, and sent down water from the sky, by means of which He produced fruits as a provision for you. So do not set up rivals to God, when you know (better).

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن كُنتُمْ فِى رَيْبٍۢ مِّمَّا نَزَّلْنَا عَلَىٰ عَبْدِنَا فَأْتُوا۟ بِسُورَةٍۢ مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ وَٱدْعُوا۟ شُهَدَآءَكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: If you are in doubt about what We have sent down to Our servant, then bring a sūra like it, and call your witnesses, other than God, if you are truthful.

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِن لَّمْ تَفْعَلُوا۟ وَلَن تَفْعَلُوا۟ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ ۖ أُعِدَّتْ لِلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: If you do not (do this), and you will not (do it), then guard (yourselves) against the Fire – its fuel is people and stones – which is prepared for the disbelievers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَبَشِّرِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ أَنَّ لَهُمْ جَنَّٰتٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ ۖ كُلَّمَا رُزِقُوا۟ مِنْهَا مِن ثَمَرَةٍۢ رِّزْقًۭا ۙ قَالُوا۟ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِى رُزِقْنَا مِن قَبْلُ ۖ وَأُتُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُتَشَٰبِهًۭا ۖ وَلَهُمْ فِيهَآ أَزْوَٰجٌۭ مُّطَهَّرَةٌۭ ۖ وَهُمْ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
verses.text: Give good news to those who believe and do righteous deeds, that for them (there are) Gardens through which rivers flow. Whenever they are provided with fruit from there as provision, they will say, ‘This is what we were provided with before,’ (for) they will be given similar things (to eat). There they will also have pure spouses, and there they will remain.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَسْتَحْىِۦٓ أَن يَضْرِبَ مَثَلًۭا مَّا بَعُوضَةًۭ فَمَا فَوْقَهَا ۚ فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ فَيَعْلَمُونَ أَنَّهُ ٱلْحَقُّ مِن رَّبِّهِمْ ۖ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فَيَقُولُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَٰذَا مَثَلًۭا ۘ يُضِلُّ بِهِۦ كَثِيرًۭا وَيَهْدِى بِهِۦ كَثِيرًۭا ۚ وَمَا يُضِلُّ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلْفَٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: Surely God is not ashamed to strike a parable even of a gnat or anything above it. As for those who believe, they know that it is the truth from their Lord, but as for those who disbelieve, they will say, ‘What does God intend by this parable?’ He leads many astray by it and guides many by it, but He does not lead any astray by it except the wicked,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَنقُضُونَ عَهْدَ ٱللَّهِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مِيثَٰقِهِۦ وَيَقْطَعُونَ مَآ أَمَرَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِۦٓ أَن يُوصَلَ وَيُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْخَٰسِرُونَ
verses.text: who break the covenant of God, after its ratification, and sever what God has commanded to be joined, and foment corruption on the earth. Those – they are the losers.

verses.quran_arabic: كَيْفَ تَكْفُرُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَكُنتُمْ أَمْوَٰتًۭا فَأَحْيَٰكُمْ ۖ ثُمَّ يُمِيتُكُمْ ثُمَّ يُحْيِيكُمْ ثُمَّ إِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: How can you disbelieve in God, when you were (once) dead and He gave you life? Then He causes you to die, then He gives you life (again), (and) then to Him you are returned?

verses.quran_arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ لَكُم مَّا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًۭا ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَسَوَّىٰهُنَّ سَبْعَ سَمَٰوَٰتٍۢ ۚ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: He (it is) who created for you what is on the earth – all (of it). Then He mounted (upward) to the sky and fashioned them (as) seven heavens. He has knowledge of everything.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى جَاعِلٌۭ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ خَلِيفَةًۭ ۖ قَالُوٓا۟ أَتَجْعَلُ فِيهَا مَن يُفْسِدُ فِيهَا وَيَسْفِكُ ٱلدِّمَآءَ وَنَحْنُ نُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِكَ وَنُقَدِّسُ لَكَ ۖ قَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when your Lord said to the angels, ‘Surely I am placing on the earth a ruler.’ They said, ‘Will You place on it someone who will foment corruption on it, and shed blood, while we glorify (You) with Your praise and call You holy?’ He said, ‘Surely I know what you do not know.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَعَلَّمَ ءَادَمَ ٱلْأَسْمَآءَ كُلَّهَا ثُمَّ عَرَضَهُمْ عَلَى ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ فَقَالَ أَنۢبِـُٔونِى بِأَسْمَآءِ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: And He taught Adam the names – all of them. Then He presented them to the angels, and said, ‘Inform Me of the names of these, if you are truthful.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَٰنَكَ لَا عِلْمَ لَنَآ إِلَّا مَا عَلَّمْتَنَآ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: They said, ‘Glory to You! We have no knowledge except for what You have taught us. Surely You – You are the Knowing, the Wise.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰٓـَٔادَمُ أَنۢبِئْهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ ۖ فَلَمَّآ أَنۢبَأَهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ قَالَ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ غَيْبَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَأَعْلَمُ مَا تُبْدُونَ وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْتُمُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Adam! Inform them of their names.’ And when he had informed them of their names, He said, ‘Did I not say to you, “Surely I know the unseen (things) of the heavens and the earth”? I know what you reveal and what you have concealed.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: (Remember) when We said to the angels, ‘Prostrate yourselves before Adam,’ and they prostrated themselves, except Iblīs. He refused and became arrogant, and was one of the disbelievers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقُلْنَا يَٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَكُلَا مِنْهَا رَغَدًا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هَٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: And We said, ‘Adam! Inhabit the Garden, you and your wife, and eat freely of it wherever you please, but do not go near this tree, or you will both be among the evildoers.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَزَلَّهُمَا ٱلشَّيْطَٰنُ عَنْهَا فَأَخْرَجَهُمَا مِمَّا كَانَا فِيهِ ۖ وَقُلْنَا ٱهْبِطُوا۟ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّۭ ۖ وَلَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُسْتَقَرٌّۭ وَمَتَٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍۢ
verses.text: Then Satan caused them both to slip from there, and to go out from where they were. And We said, ‘Go down, some of you an enemy to others! The earth is a dwelling place for you, and enjoyment (of life) for a time.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَتَلَقَّىٰٓ ءَادَمُ مِن رَّبِّهِۦ كَلِمَٰتٍۢ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: Then Adam received certain words from his Lord, and He turned to him (in forgiveness). Surely He – He is the One who turns (in forgiveness), the Compassionate.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَتَلَقَّىٰ ءَادَمَ مِن رَّبِّهِۦ كَلِمَٰتٞ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡهِۦۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
canonical_variants.english: Thereupon Adam was received by words from His Lord. Thus, He granted him repentance and accepted it from him. Indeed, it is He Who is the Superb Granter and Accepter of repentance, the Bestower of mercy.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَتَلَقَّىٰ ءَادَمَ مِن رَّبِّهِۦ كَلِمَٰتٞ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡهِۦۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
canonical_variants.english: Thereupon Adam was received by words from His Lord. Thus, He granted him repentance and accepted it from him. Indeed, it is He Who is the Superb Granter and Accepter of repentance, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْنَا ٱهْبِطُوا۟ مِنْهَا جَمِيعًۭا ۖ فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًۭى فَمَن تَبِعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
verses.text: We said, ‘Go down from it – all (of you)! If any guidance comes to you from Me, whoever follows My guidance – (there will be) no fear on them, nor will they sorrow.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ ۖ هُمْ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
verses.text: But those who disbelieve and call Our signs a lie – those are the companions of the Fire. There they will remain.’

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَوْفُوا۟ بِعَهْدِىٓ أُوفِ بِعَهْدِكُمْ وَإِيَّٰىَ فَٱرْهَبُونِ
verses.text: Sons of Israel! Remember My blessing which I bestowed on you. Fulfill My covenant (and) I shall fulfill your covenant, and Me – fear Me (alone).

verses.quran_arabic: وَءَامِنُوا۟ بِمَآ أَنزَلْتُ مُصَدِّقًۭا لِّمَا مَعَكُمْ وَلَا تَكُونُوٓا۟ أَوَّلَ كَافِرٍۭ بِهِۦ ۖ وَلَا تَشْتَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِى ثَمَنًۭا قَلِيلًۭا وَإِيَّٰىَ فَٱتَّقُونِ
verses.text: Believe in what I have sent down, confirming what is with you, and do not be the first to disbelieve in it. Do not sell My signs for a small price, and guard (yourselves) against Me.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا تَلْبِسُوا۟ ٱلْحَقَّ بِٱلْبَٰطِلِ وَتَكْتُمُوا۟ ٱلْحَقَّ وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Do not mix the truth with falsehood, and do not conceal the truth when you know (better).

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَٱرْكَعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱلرَّٰكِعِينَ
verses.text: Observe the prayer and give the alms, and bow with the ones who bow.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ أَتَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبِرِّ وَتَنسَوْنَ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَنتُمْ تَتْلُونَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ ۚ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: Do you command the people to piety and forget yourselves, though you recite the Book? Will you not understand?

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱسْتَعِينُوا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَٱلصَّلَوٰةِ ۚ وَإِنَّهَا لَكَبِيرَةٌ إِلَّا عَلَى ٱلْخَٰشِعِينَ
verses.text: Seek help in patience and the prayer. Surely it is hard indeed, except for the humble,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَظُنُّونَ أَنَّهُم مُّلَٰقُوا۟ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِ رَٰجِعُونَ
verses.text: who think that they will meet their Lord, and that they will return to Him.

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَنِّى فَضَّلْتُكُمْ عَلَى ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Sons of Israel! Remember My blessing which I bestowed on you, and that I have favored you over the worlds.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًۭا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍۢ شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفَٰعَةٌۭ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌۭ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: Guard (yourselves) against a Day when no one will intercede for another at all, and no intercession will be accepted from him, and no compensation taken from him, nor will they be helped.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ نَجَّيْنَٰكُم مِّنْ ءَالِ فِرْعَوْنَ يَسُومُونَكُمْ سُوٓءَ ٱلْعَذَابِ يُذَبِّحُونَ أَبْنَآءَكُمْ وَيَسْتَحْيُونَ نِسَآءَكُمْ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكُم بَلَآءٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَظِيمٌۭ
verses.text: (Remember) when We rescued you from the house of Pharaoh. They were inflicting on you the evil punishment, slaughtering your sons and sparing your women. In that was a great test from your Lord.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ فَرَقْنَا بِكُمُ ٱلْبَحْرَ فَأَنجَيْنَٰكُمْ وَأَغْرَقْنَآ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: And when We parted the sea for you, We rescued you, and We drowned the house of Pharaoh while you were looking on.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ وَٰعَدْنَا مُوسَىٰٓ أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةًۭ ثُمَّ ٱتَّخَذْتُمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ وَأَنتُمْ ظَٰلِمُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when We appointed for Moses forty nights. Then you took the calf after he (was gone), and you were evildoers.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذۡ وَعَدۡنَا مُوسۭيٰٓ أَرۡبَعِينَ لَيۡلَةٗ ثُمَّ اَ۪تَّخَذتُّمُ اُ۬لۡعِجۡلَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِۦ وَأَنتُمۡ ظَٰلِمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when We appointed for Moses forty nights. Then you took the calf (for worship) after him, while you were unjust.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذۡ وَعَدۡنَا مُوسۭيٰ  أَرۡبَعِينَ لَيۡلَةٗ ثُمَّ اَ۪تَّخَذتُّمُ اُ۬لۡعِجۡلَ مِنۢ بَعۡدِهِۦ وَأَنتُمۡ ظَٰلِمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when We appointed for Moses forty nights. Then you took the calf (for worship) after him, while you were unjust.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ عَفَوْنَا عَنكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ ذَٰلِكَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: Then We pardoned you after that, so that you might be thankful.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتَٰبَ وَٱلْفُرْقَانَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: And (remember) when We gave Moses the Book and the Deliverance, so that you might be (rightly) guided.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِۦ يَٰقَوْمِ إِنَّكُمْ ظَلَمْتُمْ أَنفُسَكُم بِٱتِّخَاذِكُمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ فَتُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ بَارِئِكُمْ فَٱقْتُلُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌۭ لَّكُمْ عِندَ بَارِئِكُمْ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: And when Moses said to his people, ‘My people! Surely you have done yourselves evil by taking the calf. So turn to your Creator (in repentance), and kill one another. That will be better for you in the sight of your Creator.’ Then He turned to you (in forgiveness). Surely He – He is the One who turns (in forgiveness), the Compassionate.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قُلْتُمْ يَٰمُوسَىٰ لَن نُّؤْمِنَ لَكَ حَتَّىٰ نَرَى ٱللَّهَ جَهْرَةًۭ فَأَخَذَتْكُمُ ٱلصَّٰعِقَةُ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when you said, ‘Moses! We shall not believe you until we see God openly,’ and the thunderbolt took you while you were looking on.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ بَعَثْنَٰكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ مَوْتِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: Then We raised you up after your death, so that you might be thankful.

verses.quran_arabic: وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْغَمَامَ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ ۖ كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبَٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنَٰكُمْ ۖ وَمَا ظَلَمُونَا وَلَٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ
verses.text: And We overshadowed you (with) the cloud, and We sent down on you the manna and the quails: ‘Eat from the good things which We have provided you.’ They did not do Us evil, but they did themselves evil.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا ٱدْخُلُوا۟ هَٰذِهِ ٱلْقَرْيَةَ فَكُلُوا۟ مِنْهَا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمْ رَغَدًۭا وَٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْبَابَ سُجَّدًۭا وَقُولُوا۟ حِطَّةٌۭ نَّغْفِرْ لَكُمْ خَطَٰيَٰكُمْ ۚ وَسَنَزِيدُ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: (Remember) when We said, ‘Enter this town and eat freely of it wherever you please, and enter the gate in prostration and say: “Ḥiṭṭa.” We shall forgive you your sins and increase the doers of good.’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا اَ۟دْخُلُواْ هَٰذِهِ اِ۬لْقَرْيَةَ فَكُلُواْ مِنْهَا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمْ رَغَداٗ وَادْخُلُواْ اُ۬لْبَابَ سُجَّداٗ وَقُولُواْ حِطَّةٞ يُغْفَرْ لَكُمْ خَطَٰيَٰكُمْۖ وَسَنَزِيدُ اُ۬لْمُحْسِنِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when We said, "Enter this town and eat from it freely wherever you will, but enter the gate bowing down and say, 'disburden (us)'. Your offenses will be forgiven for you, and We will give more to those who excel in doing good."

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا اَ۟دْخُلُواْ هَٰذِهِ اِ۬لْقَرْيَةَ فَكُلُواْ مِنْهَا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمْ رَغَداٗ وَادْخُلُواْ اُ۬لْبَابَ سُجَّداٗ وَقُولُواْ حِطَّةٞ يُغْفَرْ لَكُمْ خَطَٰيٰ۪كُمْۖ وَسَنَزِيدُ اُ۬لْمُحْسِنِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when We said, "Enter this town and eat from it freely wherever you will, but enter the gate bowing down and say, 'disburden (us)'. Your offenses will be forgiven for you, and We will give more to those who excel in doing good."

verses.quran_arabic: فَبَدَّلَ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ قَوْلًا غَيْرَ ٱلَّذِى قِيلَ لَهُمْ فَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ رِجْزًۭا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْسُقُونَ
verses.text: But those who did evil exchanged a word other than that which had been spoken to them. So We sent down on those who did evil wrath from the sky, because they were acting wickedly.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَإِذِ ٱسْتَسْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِۦ فَقُلْنَا ٱضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلْحَجَرَ ۖ فَٱنفَجَرَتْ مِنْهُ ٱثْنَتَا عَشْرَةَ عَيْنًۭا ۖ قَدْ عَلِمَ كُلُّ أُنَاسٍۢ مَّشْرَبَهُمْ ۖ كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِ ٱللَّهِ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
verses.text: (Remember) when Moses asked for water for his people, and We said, ‘Strike the rock with your staff,’ and (there) gushed forth from it twelve springs. All the people already knew their drinking place: ‘Eat and drink from the provision of God, and do not act wickedly on the earth, fomenting corruption.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قُلْتُمْ يَٰمُوسَىٰ لَن نَّصْبِرَ عَلَىٰ طَعَامٍۢ وَٰحِدٍۢ فَٱدْعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ يُخْرِجْ لَنَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنۢ بَقْلِهَا وَقِثَّآئِهَا وَفُومِهَا وَعَدَسِهَا وَبَصَلِهَا ۖ قَالَ أَتَسْتَبْدِلُونَ ٱلَّذِى هُوَ أَدْنَىٰ بِٱلَّذِى هُوَ خَيْرٌ ۚ ٱهْبِطُوا۟ مِصْرًۭا فَإِنَّ لَكُم مَّا سَأَلْتُمْ ۗ وَضُرِبَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلذِّلَّةُ وَٱلْمَسْكَنَةُ وَبَآءُو بِغَضَبٍۢ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ۗ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ يَكْفُرُونَ بِـَٔايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَقْتُلُونَ ٱلنَّبِيِّۦنَ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ ۗ ذَٰلِكَ بِمَا عَصَوا۟ وَّكَانُوا۟ يَعْتَدُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when you said, ‘Moses! We cannot endure just one kind of food. Call on your Lord for us, that He may bring forth for us some of what the earth grows: its green herbs, its cucumbers, its corn, its lentils, and its onions.’ He said, ‘Would you exchange what is worse for what is better? Go (back) down to Egypt! Surely you will have what you ask for.’ Humiliation and poverty were stamped upon them, and they incurred the anger of God. That was because they had disbelieved in the signs of God, and killed the prophets without any right. That was because they disobeyed and went on transgressing.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱلَّذِينَ هَادُوا۟ وَٱلنَّصَٰرَىٰ وَٱلصَّٰبِـِٔينَ مَنْ ءَامَنَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْءَاخِرِ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحًۭا فَلَهُمْ أَجْرُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ وَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
verses.text: Surely those who believe, and those who are Jews, and the Christians, and the Sabians – whoever believes in God and the Last Day, and does righteousness – they have their reward with their Lord. (There will be) no fear on them, nor will they sorrow.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ أَخَذْنَا مِيثَٰقَكُمْ وَرَفَعْنَا فَوْقَكُمُ ٱلطُّورَ خُذُوا۟ مَآ ءَاتَيْنَٰكُم بِقُوَّةٍۢ وَٱذْكُرُوا۟ مَا فِيهِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when We took a covenant with you, and raised the mountain above you: ‘Hold fast what We have given you, and remember what is in it, so that you may guard (yourselves).’

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّيْتُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ فَلَوْلَا فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُۥ لَكُنتُم مِّنَ ٱلْخَٰسِرِينَ
verses.text: Then you turned away after that, and if (it were) not (for the) favor of God on you, and His mercy, you would indeed have been among the losers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱعْتَدَوْا۟ مِنكُمْ فِى ٱلسَّبْتِ فَقُلْنَا لَهُمْ كُونُوا۟ قِرَدَةً خَٰسِـِٔينَ
verses.text: Certainly you know those of you who transgressed in (the matter of) the sabbath, and (that) We said to them, ‘Become apes, skulking away!’

verses.quran_arabic: فَجَعَلْنَٰهَا نَكَٰلًۭا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهَا وَمَا خَلْفَهَا وَمَوْعِظَةًۭ لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: We made it a punishment for their own time and what followed, and an admonition for the ones who guard (themselves).

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَأْمُرُكُمْ أَن تَذْبَحُوا۟ بَقَرَةًۭ ۖ قَالُوٓا۟ أَتَتَّخِذُنَا هُزُوًۭا ۖ قَالَ أَعُوذُ بِٱللَّهِ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجَٰهِلِينَ
verses.text: (Remember) when Moses said to his people, ‘Surely God commands you to slaughter a cow.’ They said, ‘Do you take us in mockery?’ He said, ‘I take refuge with God from being one of the ignorant.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ ٱدْعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ يُبَيِّن لَّنَا مَا هِىَ ۚ قَالَ إِنَّهُۥ يَقُولُ إِنَّهَا بَقَرَةٌۭ لَّا فَارِضٌۭ وَلَا بِكْرٌ عَوَانٌۢ بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ فَٱفْعَلُوا۟ مَا تُؤْمَرُونَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Call on your Lord for us, so that He may make clear to us what it (should be).’ He said, ‘Surely He says, “Surely it is to be a cow, not old and not young, (but) an age between that.” Do what you are commanded!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ ٱدْعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ يُبَيِّن لَّنَا مَا لَوْنُهَا ۚ قَالَ إِنَّهُۥ يَقُولُ إِنَّهَا بَقَرَةٌۭ صَفْرَآءُ فَاقِعٌۭ لَّوْنُهَا تَسُرُّ ٱلنَّٰظِرِينَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Call on your Lord for us, so that He may make clear to us what color it (should be).’ He said, ‘Surely He says, “Surely it is to be a yellow cow, its color bright, delighting to the onlookers.”’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ ٱدْعُ لَنَا رَبَّكَ يُبَيِّن لَّنَا مَا هِىَ إِنَّ ٱلْبَقَرَ تَشَٰبَهَ عَلَيْنَا وَإِنَّآ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَمُهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: They said, ‘Call on your Lord for us, so that He may make clear to us what (kind) it (should be). Surely cows are all alike to us. And surely (then), if God pleases, we shall indeed be (rightly) guided.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ إِنَّهُۥ يَقُولُ إِنَّهَا بَقَرَةٌۭ لَّا ذَلُولٌۭ تُثِيرُ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَلَا تَسْقِى ٱلْحَرْثَ مُسَلَّمَةٌۭ لَّا شِيَةَ فِيهَا ۚ قَالُوا۟ ٱلْـَٰٔنَ جِئْتَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ فَذَبَحُوهَا وَمَا كَادُوا۟ يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: He said, ‘Surely He says, “Surely it is to be a cow, not broken in to plough the earth or to water the field, (but one that is) sound, without any blemish on it.”’ They said, ‘Now you have brought the truth.’ So they slaughtered it, though they nearly did not.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قَتَلْتُمْ نَفْسًۭا فَٱدَّٰرَْٰٔتُمْ فِيهَا ۖ وَٱللَّهُ مُخْرِجٌۭ مَّا كُنتُمْ تَكْتُمُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when you killed a man, and you argued about it, but God brought forth what you were concealing.

verses.quran_arabic: فَقُلْنَا ٱضْرِبُوهُ بِبَعْضِهَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُحْىِ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَيُرِيكُمْ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: So We said, ‘Strike him with part of it.’ In this way God brings the dead to life, and shows you His signs so that you may understand.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ قَسَتْ قُلُوبُكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ ذَٰلِكَ فَهِىَ كَٱلْحِجَارَةِ أَوْ أَشَدُّ قَسْوَةًۭ ۚ وَإِنَّ مِنَ ٱلْحِجَارَةِ لَمَا يَتَفَجَّرُ مِنْهُ ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ ۚ وَإِنَّ مِنْهَا لَمَا يَشَّقَّقُ فَيَخْرُجُ مِنْهُ ٱلْمَآءُ ۚ وَإِنَّ مِنْهَا لَمَا يَهْبِطُ مِنْ خَشْيَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Then your hearts became hardened after that, and they (became) like stones or even harder. Surely (there are) some stones indeed from which rivers gush forth, and surely (there are) some indeed which have been split open, so that water comes out of them, and surely (there are) some indeed which fall down from fear of God. God is not oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: ثُمَّ قَسَتۡ قُلُوبُكُمُۥ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ ذَٰلِكَ فَهِيَ كَٱلۡحِجَارَةِ أَوۡ أَشَدُّ قَسۡوَةٗۚ وَإِنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡحِجَارَةِ لَمَا يَتَفَجَّرُ مِنۡهُ ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۚ وَإِنَّ مِنۡهَا لَمَا يَشَّقَّقُ فَيَخۡرُجُ مِنۡهُ ٱلۡمَآءُۚ وَإِنَّ مِنۡهَا لَمَا يَهۡبِطُ مِنۡ خَشۡيَةِ ٱللَّهِۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Then after that your hearts hardened, so that they were as rocks or even harder. For surely from some rocks rivers gush out, and surely some others splinter so that water comes out from them, and surely some others sink in awe of Allah. And Allah is never oblivious of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: ثُمَّ قَسَتۡ قُلُوبُكُمُۥ مِنۢ بَعۡدِ ذَٰلِكَ فَهِيَ كَٱلۡحِجَارَةِ أَوۡ أَشَدُّ قَسۡوَةٗۚ وَإِنَّ مِنَ ٱلۡحِجَارَةِ لَمَا يَتَفَجَّرُ مِنۡهُ ٱلۡأَنۡهَٰرُۚ وَإِنَّ مِنۡهَا لَمَا يَشَّقَّقُ فَيَخۡرُجُ مِنۡهُ ٱلۡمَآءُۚ وَإِنَّ مِنۡهَا لَمَا يَهۡبِطُ مِنۡ خَشۡيَةِ ٱللَّهِۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Then after that your hearts hardened, so that they were as rocks or even harder. For surely from some rocks rivers gush out, and surely some others splinter so that water comes out from them, and surely some others sink in awe of Allah. And Allah is never oblivious of what they do.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ أَفَتَطْمَعُونَ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ لَكُمْ وَقَدْ كَانَ فَرِيقٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ يَسْمَعُونَ كَلَٰمَ ٱللَّهِ ثُمَّ يُحَرِّفُونَهُۥ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا عَقَلُوهُ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Are you eager that they should believe you , even though a group of them has already heard the word of God, (and) then altered it after they had understood it – and they know (they have done this)?

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا لَقُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا وَإِذَا خَلَا بَعْضُهُمْ إِلَىٰ بَعْضٍۢ قَالُوٓا۟ أَتُحَدِّثُونَهُم بِمَا فَتَحَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكُمْ لِيُحَآجُّوكُم بِهِۦ عِندَ رَبِّكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: When they meet those who believe, they say, ‘We believe,’ but when some of them meet with others, they say, ‘Do you report to them what God has disclosed to you, so that they may dispute with you by means of it in the presence of your Lord? Will you not understand?’

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَلَا يَعْلَمُونَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
verses.text: Do they not know that God knows what they keep secret and what they speak aloud?

verses.quran_arabic: وَمِنْهُمْ أُمِّيُّونَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ إِلَّآ أَمَانِىَّ وَإِنْ هُمْ إِلَّا يَظُنُّونَ
verses.text: Some of them are common people – they do not know the Book, only wishful thinking, and they only conjecture.

verses.quran_arabic: فَوَيْلٌۭ لِّلَّذِينَ يَكْتُبُونَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ بِأَيْدِيهِمْ ثُمَّ يَقُولُونَ هَٰذَا مِنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ لِيَشْتَرُوا۟ بِهِۦ ثَمَنًۭا قَلِيلًۭا ۖ فَوَيْلٌۭ لَّهُم مِّمَّا كَتَبَتْ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَوَيْلٌۭ لَّهُم مِّمَّا يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: So woe to those who write the Book with their (own) hands, (and) then say, ‘This is from God,’ in order to sell it for a small price. Woe to them for what their hands have written, and woe to them for what they earn.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَن تَمَسَّنَا ٱلنَّارُ إِلَّآ أَيَّامًۭا مَّعْدُودَةًۭ ۚ قُلْ أَتَّخَذْتُمْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ عَهْدًۭا فَلَن يُخْلِفَ ٱللَّهُ عَهْدَهُۥٓ ۖ أَمْ تَقُولُونَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: And they say, ‘The Fire will only touch us for a number of days.’ Say: ‘Have you taken a covenant with God? God will not break His covenant. Or do you say about God what you do not know?

verses.quran_arabic: بَلَىٰ مَن كَسَبَ سَيِّئَةًۭ وَأَحَٰطَتْ بِهِۦ خَطِيٓـَٔتُهُۥ فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ ۖ هُمْ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
verses.text: Yes indeed! Whoever commits evil and is encompassed by his sin – those are the companions of the Fire. There they will remain.

canonical_variants.arabic: بَلَىٰ مَن كَسَبَ سَيِّئَةٗ وَأَحَٰطَتْ بِهِۦ خَطِيٓـَٰٔتُهُۥ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ اُ۬لنَّارِ هُمْ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Yes indeed, whoever has earned an evil deed and whose offenses have surrounded him—then those are the fellows of the Fire; therein they abide.

canonical_variants.arabic: بَل۪ىٰ مَن كَسَبَ سَيِّئَةٗ وَأَحَٰطَتْ بِهِۦ خَطِيٓـَٰٔتُهُۥ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ اُ۬لنّ۪ارِ هُمْ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Yes indeed, whoever has earned an evil deed and whose offenses have surrounded him—then those are the fellows of the Fire; therein they abide.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ۖ هُمْ فِيهَا خَٰلِدُونَ
verses.text: But those who believe and do righteous deeds – those are the companions of the Garden. There they will remain.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ أَخَذْنَا مِيثَٰقَ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ لَا تَعْبُدُونَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهَ وَبِٱلْوَٰلِدَيْنِ إِحْسَانًۭا وَذِى ٱلْقُرْبَىٰ وَٱلْيَتَٰمَىٰ وَٱلْمَسَٰكِينِ وَقُولُوا۟ لِلنَّاسِ حُسْنًۭا وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّيْتُمْ إِلَّا قَلِيلًۭا مِّنكُمْ وَأَنتُم مُّعْرِضُونَ
verses.text: (Remember) when We took a covenant with the Sons of Israel: ‘Do not serve (anyone) but God, and (do) good to parents and family, and the orphans, and the poor, and speak well to the people, and observe the prayer and give the alms.’ Then you turned away in aversion, except for a few of you.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذۡ أَخَذۡنَا مِيثَٰقَ بَنِي إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ لَا يَعۡبُدُونَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهَ وَبِٱلۡوَٰلِدَيۡنِ إِحۡسَانٗا وَذِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَٱلۡيَتَٰمَىٰ وَٱلۡمَسَٰكِينِ وَقُولُواْ لِلنَّاسِ حُسۡنٗا وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُواْ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّيۡتُمُۥ إِلَّا قَلِيلٗا مِّنكُمُۥ وَأَنتُمُۥ مُعۡرِضُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when We took a pledge from the Children of Israel: "They shall worship none but Allah, and excel in showing kindness to the parents and the relative and orphans and the destitute, and say kind words to mankind and establish the prayers and bring the purifying charity."

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذۡ أَخَذۡنَا مِيثَٰقَ بَنِي إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ لَا يَعۡبُدُونَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهَ وَبِٱلۡوَٰلِدَيۡنِ إِحۡسَانٗا وَذِي ٱلۡقُرۡبَىٰ وَٱلۡيَتَٰمَىٰ وَٱلۡمَسَٰكِينِ وَقُولُواْ لِلنَّاسِ حُسۡنٗا وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُواْ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّيۡتُمُۥ إِلَّا قَلِيلٗا مِّنكُمُۥ وَأَنتُمُۥ مُعۡرِضُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when We took a pledge from the Children of Israel: "They shall worship none but Allah, and excel in showing kindness to the parents and the relative and orphans and the destitute, and say kind words to mankind and establish the prayers and bring the purifying charity."

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ أَخَذْنَا مِيثَٰقَكُمْ لَا تَسْفِكُونَ دِمَآءَكُمْ وَلَا تُخْرِجُونَ أَنفُسَكُم مِّن دِيَٰرِكُمْ ثُمَّ أَقْرَرْتُمْ وَأَنتُمْ تَشْهَدُونَ
verses.text: And when We took a covenant with you: ‘Do not shed your (own) blood, and do not expel your (own people) from your homes,’ then you agreed (to it) and bore witness.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ أَنتُمْ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ تَقْتُلُونَ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَتُخْرِجُونَ فَرِيقًۭا مِّنكُم مِّن دِيَٰرِهِمْ تَظَٰهَرُونَ عَلَيْهِم بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَإِن يَأْتُوكُمْ أُسَٰرَىٰ تُفَٰدُوهُمْ وَهُوَ مُحَرَّمٌ عَلَيْكُمْ إِخْرَاجُهُمْ ۚ أَفَتُؤْمِنُونَ بِبَعْضِ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ وَتَكْفُرُونَ بِبَعْضٍۢ ۚ فَمَا جَزَآءُ مَن يَفْعَلُ ذَٰلِكَ مِنكُمْ إِلَّا خِزْىٌۭ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَيَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ يُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰٓ أَشَدِّ ٱلْعَذَابِ ۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Then you became those who were killing yourselves, and expelling some of you from their homes, supporting each other against them in sin and enmity. And if they come to you as captives, you ransom (them), though their expulsion was forbidden to you. Do you believe in part of the Book and disbelieve in part? What is the payment for the one among you who does that, except disgrace in this present life, and on the Day of Resurrection they will be returned to the harshest punishment? God is not oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ ثُمَّ أَنتُمۡ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ تَقۡتُلُونَ أَنفُسَكُمۡ وَتُخۡرِجُونَ فَرِيقٗا مِّنكُم مِّن دِيٰ۪رِهِمۡ تَظَّٰهَرُونَ عَلَيۡهِم بِالۡإِثۡمِ وَاَلۡعُدۡوَٰنِ وَإِن يَأۡتُوكُمۡ أُسَٰر۪يٰ تَفۡدُوهُمۡ وَهۡوَ مُحَرَّمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ إِخۡرَاجُهُمۡۚ أَفَتُؤۡمِنُونَ بِبَعۡضِ اِ۬لۡكِتَٰبِ وَتَكۡفُرُونَ بِبَعۡضٖۚ فَمَا جَزَآءُ مَن يَفۡعَلُ ذَٰلِكَ مِنكُمۡ إِلَّا خِزۡيٞ فِي اِ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭاۖ وَيَوۡمَ اَ۬لۡقِيَٰمَةِ يُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰٓ أَشَدِّ اِ۬لۡعَذَابِۗ وَمَا اَ۬للَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Then here you are, killing yourselves and evicting a group of your own from their homes—backing each other against them in sin and hostility. And if they come to you as captives, you ransom them, while their eviction is forbidden to you. Is it that you believe in part of the Scripture and deny part? So what is the repayment for those of you who do that but disgrace in the Earlier Life, and (that) on the Day of Resurrection they are turned back to the most severe punishment? For Allah is never oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ ثُمَّ أَنتُمۡ هَٰؤُلَآءِ تَقۡتُلُونَ أَنفُسَكُمۡ وَتُخۡرِجُونَ فَرِيقٗا  مِّنكُم مِّن دِيٰ۪رِهِمۡ تَظَّٰهَرُونَ عَلَيۡهِم بِالۡإِثۡمِ وَاَلۡعُدۡوَٰنِ  وَإِن يَاتُوكُمۡ أُسَٰر۪يٰ تَفۡدُوهُمۡ وَهۡوَ مُحَرَّمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ  إِخۡرَاجُهُمۡۚ أَفَتُومِنُونَ بِبَعۡضِ اِ۬لۡكِتَٰبِ وَتَكۡفُرُونَ بِبَعۡضٖۚ  فَمَا جَزَآءُ مَن يَفۡعَلُ ذَٰلِكَ مِنكُمۡ إِلَّا خِزۡيٞ فِي اِ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ  اِ۬لدُّنۡيۭاۖ وَيَوۡمَ اَ۬لۡقِيَٰمَةِ يُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ أَشَدِّ اِ۬لۡعَذَابِۗ وَمَا اَ۬للَّهُ  بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Then here you are, killing yourselves and evicting a group of your own from their homes—backing each other against them in sin and hostility. And if they come to you as captives, you ransom them, while their eviction is forbidden to you. Is it that you believe in part of the Scripture and deny part? So what is the repayment for those of you who do that but disgrace in the Earlier Life, and (that) on the Day of Resurrection they are turned back to the most severe punishment? For Allah is never oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: ثُمَّ أَنتُمۡ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ تَقۡتُلُونَ أَنفُسَكُمۡ وَتُخۡرِجُونَ فَرِيقٗا مِّنكُم مِّن دِيَٰرِهِمۡ تَظَٰهَرُونَ عَلَيۡهِم بِٱلۡإِثۡمِ وَٱلۡعُدۡوَٰنِ وَإِن يَأۡتُوكُمۡ أُسَٰرَىٰ تُفَٰدُوهُمۡ وَهُوَ مُحَرَّمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ إِخۡرَاجُهُمۡۚ أَفَتُؤۡمِنُونَ بِبَعۡضِ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَتَكۡفُرُونَ بِبَعۡضٖۚ فَمَا جَزَآءُ مَن يَفۡعَلُ ذَٰلِكَ مِنكُمۡ إِلَّا خِزۡيٞ فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنۡيَاۖ وَيَوۡمَ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ يُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰٓ أَشَدِّ ٱلۡعَذَابِۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعۡمَلُونَ

So what is the repayment for those of you who do that but disgrace in the Earlier Life, and (that) on the Day of Resurrection they are turned back to the most severe punishment? So what is the repayment for those of you who do that but disgrace in the Earlier Life, and (that) on the Day of Resurrection they are turned back to the most severe punishment? For Allah is never oblivious of what they do.

canonical_variants.arabic: ثُمَّ أَنتُمْ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ تَقْتُلُونَ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَتُخْرِجُونَ فَرِيقاٗ مِّنكُم مِّن دِيٰ۪رِهِمْ تَظَّٰهَرُونَ عَلَيْهِم بِالِاثْمِ وَالْعُدْوَٰنِۖ ۞ وَإِنْ يَّاتُوكُمُۥٓ أُسَٰر۪ىٰ تُفَٰدُوهُمْ وَهُوَ مُحَرَّمٌ عَلَيْكُمُۥٓ إِخْرَاجُهُمُۥٓۖ أَفَتُومِنُونَ بِبَعْضِ اِ۬لْكِتَٰبِ وَتَكْفُرُونَ بِبَعْضٖۖ فَمَا جَزَآءُ مَنْ يَّفْعَلُ ذَٰلِكَ مِنكُمُۥٓ إِلَّا خِزْيٞ فِے اِ۬لْحَيَوٰةِ اِ۬لدُّنْي۪اۖ وَيَوْمَ اَ۬لْقِيَٰمَةِ يُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰٓ أَشَدِّ اِ۬لْعَذَابِۖ وَمَا اَ۬للَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا يَعْمَلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Then here you are, killing yourselves and evicting a group of your own from their homes—backing each other against them in sin and hostility. And if they come to you as captives, you do ransom them, while their eviction is forbidden to you. Is it that you believe in part of the Scripture and deny part? So what is the repayment for those of you who do that but disgrace in the Earlier Life, and (that) on the Day of Resurrection they are turned back to the most severe punishment? For Allah is never oblivious of what they do.

verses.quran_arabic: أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱشْتَرَوُا۟ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ ۖ فَلَا يُخَفَّفُ عَنْهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: Those are the ones who have purchased this present life with (the price of) the Hereafter. The punishment will not be lightened for them, nor will they be helped.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتَٰبَ وَقَفَّيْنَا مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ بِٱلرُّسُلِ ۖ وَءَاتَيْنَا عِيسَى ٱبْنَ مَرْيَمَ ٱلْبَيِّنَٰتِ وَأَيَّدْنَٰهُ بِرُوحِ ٱلْقُدُسِ ۗ أَفَكُلَّمَا جَآءَكُمْ رَسُولٌۢ بِمَا لَا تَهْوَىٰٓ أَنفُسُكُمُ ٱسْتَكْبَرْتُمْ فَفَرِيقًۭا كَذَّبْتُمْ وَفَرِيقًۭا تَقْتُلُونَ
verses.text: Certainly We gave Moses the Book, and followed up after him with the messengers, and We gave Jesus, son of Mary, the clear signs, and supported him with the holy spirit. (But) whenever a messenger brought you what you yourselves did not desire, did you become arrogant, and some you called liars and some you killed?

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ قُلُوبُنَا غُلْفٌۢ ۚ بَل لَّعَنَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ بِكُفْرِهِمْ فَقَلِيلًۭا مَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: And they say, ‘Our hearts are covered.’ No! God has cursed them for their disbelief, and so little will they believe.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ كِتَٰبٌۭ مِّنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ مُصَدِّقٌۭ لِّمَا مَعَهُمْ وَكَانُوا۟ مِن قَبْلُ يَسْتَفْتِحُونَ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُم مَّا عَرَفُوا۟ كَفَرُوا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ فَلَعْنَةُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَى ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: When (there) came to them a Book from God, confirming what was with them – though before (this) they had asked for victory against those who disbelieved – when what they recognized came to them, they disbelieved in it. So the curse of God is on the disbelievers.

verses.quran_arabic: بِئْسَمَا ٱشْتَرَوْا۟ بِهِۦٓ أَنفُسَهُمْ أَن يَكْفُرُوا۟ بِمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بَغْيًا أَن يُنَزِّلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦ ۖ فَبَآءُو بِغَضَبٍ عَلَىٰ غَضَبٍۢ ۚ وَلِلْكَٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌۭ مُّهِينٌۭ
verses.text: Evil is what they have sold themselves for: they disbelieve in what God has sent down, (because of) envy that God should send down some of His favor on whomever He pleases of His servants. So they have incurred anger upon anger, and for the disbelievers (there is) a humiliating punishment.

canonical_variants.arabic: بِئۡسَمَا اَ۪شۡتَرَوۡاْ بِهِۦٓ أَنفُسَهُمۡ أَن يَكۡفُرُواْ بِمَآ أَنزَلَ اَ۬للَّهُ بَغۡيًا أَن يُنزِلَ اَ۬للَّهُ مِن فَضۡلِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦۖ فَبَآءُو بِغَضَبٍ عَلَىٰ غَضَبٖۚ وَلِلۡكٰ۪فِرِينَ عَذَابٞ مُّهِينٞ
canonical_variants.english: Miserable is what they have purchased in exchange for their (very) selves—that they deny what Allah has sent down, out of resentment that Allah would send down His grace upon whomever He wills of His servants. Thus they incurred wrath upon wrath, for for the deniers is a demeaning punishment.

canonical_variants.arabic: بِيسَمَا اَ۪شۡتَرَوۡاْ بِهِۦ أَنفُسَهُمۡ أَن يَكۡفُرُواْ بِمَا أَنزَلَ اَ۬للَّهُ  بَغۡيًا أَن يُنزِلَ اَ۬للَّهُ مِن فَضۡلِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦۖ  فَبَآءُو بِغَضَبٍ عَلَىٰ غَضَبٖۚ وَلِلۡكٰ۪فِرِينَ عَذَابٞ مُّهِينٞ
canonical_variants.english: Miserable is what they have purchased in exchange for their (very) selves—that they deny what Allah has sent down, out of resentment that Allah would send down His grace upon whomever He wills of His servants. Thus they incurred wrath upon wrath, for for the deniers is a demeaning punishment.

canonical_variants.arabic: بِئۡسَمَا ٱشۡتَرَوۡاْ بِهِۦ أَنفُسَهُمُۥ أَن يَكۡفُرُواْ بِمَا أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بَغۡيًا أَن يُنزِلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن فَضۡلِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦۖ فَبَآءُو بِغَضَبٍ عَلَىٰ غَضَبٖۚ وَلِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٞ مُّهِينٞ
canonical_variants.english: Miserable is what they have purchased in exchange for their (very) selves—that they deny what Allah has sent down, out of resentment that Allah would send down His grace upon whomever He wills of His servants. Thus they incurred wrath upon wrath, for for the deniers is a demeaning punishment.

canonical_variants.arabic: بِئۡسَمَا ٱشۡتَرَوۡاْ بِهِۦ أَنفُسَهُمُۥ أَن يَكۡفُرُواْ بِمَا أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بَغۡيًا أَن يُنزِلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن فَضۡلِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنۡ عِبَادِهِۦۖ فَبَآءُو بِغَضَبٍ عَلَىٰ غَضَبٖۚ وَلِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٞ مُّهِينٞ
canonical_variants.english: Miserable is what they have purchased in exchange for their (very) selves—that they deny what Allah has sent down, out of resentment that Allah would send down His grace upon whomever He wills of His servants. Thus they incurred wrath upon wrath, for for the deniers is a demeaning punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ ءَامِنُوا۟ بِمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ قَالُوا۟ نُؤْمِنُ بِمَآ أُنزِلَ عَلَيْنَا وَيَكْفُرُونَ بِمَا وَرَآءَهُۥ وَهُوَ ٱلْحَقُّ مُصَدِّقًۭا لِّمَا مَعَهُمْ ۗ قُلْ فَلِمَ تَقْتُلُونَ أَنۢبِيَآءَ ٱللَّهِ مِن قَبْلُ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: When it is said to them, ‘Believe in what God has sent down,’ they say, ‘We believe in what has been sent down on us,’ but they disbelieve in anything after that, when it is the truth confirming what is with them. Say: ‘Why did you kill the prophets of God before, if you were believers?’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَكُم مُّوسَىٰ بِٱلْبَيِّنَٰتِ ثُمَّ ٱتَّخَذْتُمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ وَأَنتُمْ ظَٰلِمُونَ
verses.text: Certainly Moses brought you the clear signs, (but) then you took the calf after he (was gone), and you were evildoers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ أَخَذْنَا مِيثَٰقَكُمْ وَرَفَعْنَا فَوْقَكُمُ ٱلطُّورَ خُذُوا۟ مَآ ءَاتَيْنَٰكُم بِقُوَّةٍۢ وَٱسْمَعُوا۟ ۖ قَالُوا۟ سَمِعْنَا وَعَصَيْنَا وَأُشْرِبُوا۟ فِى قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ بِكُفْرِهِمْ ۚ قُلْ بِئْسَمَا يَأْمُرُكُم بِهِۦٓ إِيمَٰنُكُمْ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: And when We took a covenant with you, and raised the mountain above you: ‘Hold fast what We have given you, and hear,’ they said, ‘We hear and disobey.’ And they were made to drink the calf in their hearts because of their disbelief. Say: ‘Evil is what your belief commands you, if you are believers.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ إِن كَانَتْ لَكُمُ ٱلدَّارُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِصَةًۭ مِّن دُونِ ٱلنَّاسِ فَتَمَنَّوُا۟ ٱلْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Say: ‘If the Home of the Hereafter with God is yours alone, to the exclusion of the people, and not for (the rest of) the people, wish for death, if you are truthful.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَن يَتَمَنَّوْهُ أَبَدًۢا بِمَا قَدَّمَتْ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌۢ بِٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: But they will never wish for it because of what their (own) hands have sent forward. God knows the evildoers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَتَجِدَنَّهُمْ أَحْرَصَ ٱلنَّاسِ عَلَىٰ حَيَوٰةٍۢ وَمِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَشْرَكُوا۟ ۚ يَوَدُّ أَحَدُهُمْ لَوْ يُعَمَّرُ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍۢ وَمَا هُوَ بِمُزَحْزِحِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ أَن يُعَمَّرَ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ بَصِيرٌۢ بِمَا يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Indeed you will find them the most desirous of people for life – even more so than the idolaters. One of them wishes to live for a thousand years, but (even) such a long life will not spare him from the punishment. God sees what they do.

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ مَن كَانَ عَدُوًّۭا لِّجِبْرِيلَ فَإِنَّهُۥ نَزَّلَهُۥ عَلَىٰ قَلْبِكَ بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ مُصَدِّقًۭا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَهُدًۭى وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Say: ‘Whoever is an enemy to Gabriel – surely he has brought it down on your heart by the permission of God, confirming what was before it, and as a guidance and good news to the believers.

verses.quran_arabic: مَن كَانَ عَدُوًّۭا لِّلَّهِ وَمَلَٰٓئِكَتِهِۦ وَرُسُلِهِۦ وَجِبْرِيلَ وَمِيكَىٰلَ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَدُوٌّۭ لِّلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: Whoever is an enemy to God, and His angels, and His messengers, and Gabriel and Michael – surely God is an enemy to the disbelievers.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكَ ءَايَٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَٰتٍۢ ۖ وَمَا يَكْفُرُ بِهَآ إِلَّا ٱلْفَٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: Certainly We have sent down to you clear signs, and no one disbelieves them except the wicked.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَكُلَّمَا عَٰهَدُوا۟ عَهْدًۭا نَّبَذَهُۥ فَرِيقٌۭ مِّنْهُم ۚ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Whenever they have made a covenant, did a group of them toss it away? No! Most of them do not believe.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌۭ مِّنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ مُصَدِّقٌۭ لِّمَا مَعَهُمْ نَبَذَ فَرِيقٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ كِتَٰبَ ٱللَّهِ وَرَآءَ ظُهُورِهِمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: When a messenger came to them from God, confirming what was with them, a group of those who were given the Book tossed the Book of God behind their backs, as if they did not know (about it).

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ مَا تَتْلُوا۟ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينُ عَلَىٰ مُلْكِ سُلَيْمَٰنَ ۖ وَمَا كَفَرَ سُلَيْمَٰنُ وَلَٰكِنَّ ٱلشَّيَٰطِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ يُعَلِّمُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ ٱلسِّحْرَ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ عَلَى ٱلْمَلَكَيْنِ بِبَابِلَ هَٰرُوتَ وَمَٰرُوتَ ۚ وَمَا يُعَلِّمَانِ مِنْ أَحَدٍ حَتَّىٰ يَقُولَآ إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ فِتْنَةٌۭ فَلَا تَكْفُرْ ۖ فَيَتَعَلَّمُونَ مِنْهُمَا مَا يُفَرِّقُونَ بِهِۦ بَيْنَ ٱلْمَرْءِ وَزَوْجِهِۦ ۚ وَمَا هُم بِضَآرِّينَ بِهِۦ مِنْ أَحَدٍ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَيَتَعَلَّمُونَ مَا يَضُرُّهُمْ وَلَا يَنفَعُهُمْ ۚ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمُوا۟ لَمَنِ ٱشْتَرَىٰهُ مَا لَهُۥ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ مِنْ خَلَٰقٍۢ ۚ وَلَبِئْسَ مَا شَرَوْا۟ بِهِۦٓ أَنفُسَهُمْ ۚ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: And they followed what the satans used to recite over the kingdom of Solomon. Solomon did not disbelieve, but the satans disbelieved. They taught the people magic, and what had been sent down to the two angels (in) Babylon, Hārūt and Mārūt.  Neither of them taught anyone, unless they both (first) said, ‘We are only a temptation, so do not disbelieve.’ And they learned from both of them how to separate a husband from his wife. Yet they did not harm anyone in this way, except by the permission of God. What they learned (only) harmed them and did not benefit them. Certainly they knew that whoever buys it has no share in the Hereafter. Evil indeed is what they have sold themselves for, if (only) they knew.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْ أَنَّهُمْ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّقَوْا۟ لَمَثُوبَةٌۭ مِّنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ خَيْرٌۭ ۖ لَّوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: If they had believed and guarded (themselves), a reward from God (would) indeed (have been) better, if (only) they knew.

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَقُولُوا۟ رَٰعِنَا وَقُولُوا۟ ٱنظُرْنَا وَٱسْمَعُوا۟ ۗ وَلِلْكَٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: You who believe! Do not say, ‘Observe us,’ but say, ‘Regard us,’ and hear. For the disbelievers (there is) a painful punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: مَّا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ وَلَا ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ أَن يُنَزَّلَ عَلَيْكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٍۢ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَخْتَصُّ بِرَحْمَتِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: Those who disbelieve among the People of the Book, and the idolaters, do not like (it) that anything good should be sent down on you from your Lord. But God chooses whomever He pleases for His mercy, and God is full of great favor.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَّا يَوَدُّ اُ۬لَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ اِ۬لۡكِتَٰبِ وَلَا اَ۬لۡمُشۡرِكِينَ أَن يُنزَلَ عَلَيۡكُم مِّنۡ خَيۡرٖ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡۗ وَاَللَّهُ يَخۡتَصُّ بِرَحۡمَتِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَاَللَّهُ ذُو اُ۬لۡفَضۡلِ اِ۬لۡعَظِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: Neither the deniers from among the People of the Scripture nor the polytheists would love that any good be bestowed upon you from on high by your Lord. Yet Allah specifies for His mercy whomever He wills, for Allah is the Possessor of great grace.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَّا يَوَدُّ  اُ۬لَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ اِ۬لۡكِتَٰبِ وَلَا اَ۬لۡمُشۡرِكِينَ  أَن يُنزَلَ عَلَيۡكُم مِّنۡ خَيۡرٖ مِّن رَّبِّكُمۡۚ وَاَللَّهُ يَخۡتَصُّ  بِرَحۡمَتِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَاَللَّهُ ذُو اُ۬لۡفَضۡلِ اِ۬لۡعَظِيم
canonical_variants.english: Neither the deniers from among the People of the Scripture nor the polytheists would love that any good be bestowed upon you from on high by your Lord. Yet Allah specifies for His mercy whomever He wills, for Allah is the Possessor of great grace.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَّا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَلَا ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ أَن يُنزَلَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ مِنۡ خَيۡرٖ مِّن رَّبِّكُمُۥۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَخۡتَصُّ بِرَحۡمَتِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلۡفَضۡلِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: Neither the deniers from among the People of the Scripture nor the polytheists would love that any good be bestowed upon you from on high by your Lord. Yet Allah specifies for His mercy whomever He wills, for Allah is the Possessor of great grace.

canonical_variants.arabic: مَّا يَوَدُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ مِنۡ أَهۡلِ ٱلۡكِتَٰبِ وَلَا ٱلۡمُشۡرِكِينَ أَن يُنزَلَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ مِنۡ خَيۡرٖ مِّن رَّبِّكُمُۥۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَخۡتَصُّ بِرَحۡمَتِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلۡفَضۡلِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
canonical_variants.english: Neither the deniers from among the People of the Scripture nor the polytheists would love that any good be bestowed upon you from on high by your Lord. Yet Allah specifies for His mercy whomever He wills, for Allah is the Possessor of great grace.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ مَا نَنسَخْ مِنْ ءَايَةٍ أَوْ نُنسِهَا نَأْتِ بِخَيْرٍۢ مِّنْهَآ أَوْ مِثْلِهَآ ۗ أَلَمْ تَعْلَمْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: Whatever verse We cancel or cause to be forgotten, We bring a better (one) than it, or (one) similar to it. Do you not know that God is powerful over everything?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَا نَنسَخۡ مِنۡ ءَايَةٍ أَوۡ نَنسَـٔۡهَا نَأۡتِ بِخَيۡرٖ مِّنۡهَآ أَوۡ مِثۡلِهَآۗ أَلَمۡ تَعۡلَمۡ أَنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٌ
canonical_variants.english: Never do We abrogate any sign nor postpone it unless We bring one better than it or similar to it. Have you not come to know that Allah is All-Powerful over everything?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَّا نَنسَخۡ مِنۡ ءَايَةٍ أَوۡ نَنسَـٔۡهَا نَاتِ بِخَيۡرٖ مِّنۡهَا أَوۡ مِثۡلِهَاۗ  أَلَمۡ تَعۡلَمۡ أَنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٌ
canonical_variants.english: Never do We abrogate any sign nor postpone it unless We bring one better than it or similar to it. Have you not come to know that Allah is All-Powerful over everything?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَا نَنسَخۡ مِنۡ ءَايَةٍ أَوۡ نَنسَـٔۡهَا نَأۡتِ بِخَيۡرٖ مِّنۡهَا أَوۡ مِثۡلِهَاۗ  أَلَمۡ تَعۡلَمۡ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٌ
canonical_variants.english: Never do We abrogate any sign nor postpone it unless We bring one better than it or similar to it. Have you not come to know that Allah is All-Powerful over everything?

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ مَا نَنسَخۡ مِنۡ ءَايَةٍ أَوۡ نَنسَـٔۡهَا نَأۡتِ بِخَيۡرٖ مِّنۡهَا أَوۡ مِثۡلِهَاۗ  أَلَمۡ تَعۡلَمۡ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءٖ قَدِيرٌ
canonical_variants.english: Never do We abrogate any sign nor postpone it unless We bring one better than it or similar to it. Have you not come to know that Allah is All-Powerful over everything?

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَمْ تَعْلَمْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ وَمَا لَكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مِن وَلِىٍّۢ وَلَا نَصِيرٍ
verses.text: Do you not know that God – to Him (belongs) the kingdom of the heavens and the earth, and you have no ally and no helper other than God.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ تُرِيدُونَ أَن تَسْـَٔلُوا۟ رَسُولَكُمْ كَمَا سُئِلَ مُوسَىٰ مِن قَبْلُ ۗ وَمَن يَتَبَدَّلِ ٱلْكُفْرَ بِٱلْإِيمَٰنِ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ سَوَآءَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ
verses.text: Or do you wish to question your messenger, as Moses was questioned before? Whoever exchanges belief for disbelief has indeed gone astray from the right way.

verses.quran_arabic: وَدَّ كَثِيرٌۭ مِّنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ لَوْ يَرُدُّونَكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ إِيمَٰنِكُمْ كُفَّارًا حَسَدًۭا مِّنْ عِندِ أَنفُسِهِم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ مَا تَبَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَٱعْفُوا۟ وَٱصْفَحُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِىَ ٱللَّهُ بِأَمْرِهِۦٓ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌۭ
verses.text: Many of the People of the Book would like (it) if you turned back into disbelievers, after your believing, (because of) jealousy on their part, after the truth has become clear to them. So pardon and excuse (them), until God brings His command. Surely God is powerful over everything.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ۚ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُوا۟ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٍۢ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌۭ
verses.text: Observe the prayer and give the alms. Whatever good you send forward for yourselves, you will find it with God. Surely God sees what you do.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَن يَدْخُلَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ إِلَّا مَن كَانَ هُودًا أَوْ نَصَٰرَىٰ ۗ تِلْكَ أَمَانِيُّهُمْ ۗ قُلْ هَاتُوا۟ بُرْهَٰنَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: They say, ‘No one will enter the Garden unless they are Jews or Christians.’ That is their wishful thinking. Say: ‘Bring your proof, if you are truthful.’

verses.quran_arabic: بَلَىٰ مَنْ أَسْلَمَ وَجْهَهُۥ لِلَّهِ وَهُوَ مُحْسِنٌۭ فَلَهُۥٓ أَجْرُهُۥ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦ وَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
verses.text: Yes indeed! Whoever submits his face to God, and he is a doer of good, has his reward with his Lord. (There will be) no fear on them, nor will they sorrow.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالَتِ ٱلْيَهُودُ لَيْسَتِ ٱلنَّصَٰرَىٰ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍۢ وَقَالَتِ ٱلنَّصَٰرَىٰ لَيْسَتِ ٱلْيَهُودُ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍۢ وَهُمْ يَتْلُونَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ ۗ كَذَٰلِكَ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ مِثْلَ قَوْلِهِمْ ۚ فَٱللَّهُ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ فِيمَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
verses.text: The Jews say, ‘The Christians have no ground to stand on;’ and the Christians say, ‘The Jews have no ground to stand on,’ though they (both) recite the Book. In this way those who have no know ledge say something similar to their saying. God will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning their differences.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّن مَّنَعَ مَسَٰجِدَ ٱللَّهِ أَن يُذْكَرَ فِيهَا ٱسْمُهُۥ وَسَعَىٰ فِى خَرَابِهَآ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ مَا كَانَ لَهُمْ أَن يَدْخُلُوهَآ إِلَّا خَآئِفِينَ ۚ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا خِزْىٌۭ وَلَهُمْ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌۭ
verses.text: And who is more evil than the one who prevents the mosques of God from having His name remembered in them, and strives for their destruction? Those – it was not for them to enter them except in fear. For them (there is) disgrace in this world, and a great punishment for them in the Hereafter.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلِلَّهِ ٱلْمَشْرِقُ وَٱلْمَغْرِبُ ۚ فَأَيْنَمَا تُوَلُّوا۟ فَثَمَّ وَجْهُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ وَٰسِعٌ عَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: The East and the West (belong) to God, so wherever you turn, there is the face of God. Surely God is embracing, knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱللَّهُ وَلَدًۭا ۗ سُبْحَٰنَهُۥ ۖ بَل لَّهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ كُلٌّۭ لَّهُۥ قَٰنِتُونَ
verses.text: They say, ‘God has taken a son.’ Glory to Him! No! Whatever is in the heavens and the earth (belongs) to Him. All are obedient before Him

verses.quran_arabic: بَدِيعُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَإِذَا قَضَىٰٓ أَمْرًۭا فَإِنَّمَا يَقُولُ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
verses.text: – Originator of the heavens and the earth. When He decrees something, He simply says to it, ‘Be!’ and it is.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ لَوْلَا يُكَلِّمُنَا ٱللَّهُ أَوْ تَأْتِينَآ ءَايَةٌۭ ۗ كَذَٰلِكَ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّثْلَ قَوْلِهِمْ ۘ تَشَٰبَهَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ ۗ قَدْ بَيَّنَّا ٱلْءَايَٰتِ لِقَوْمٍۢ يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: Those who have no knowledge say, ‘If only God would speak to us, or a sign would come to us.’ In this way those who were before them said something similar to their saying. Their hearts are alike. We have already made the signs clear to a people (who) are certain (in their belief).

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ بَشِيرًۭا وَنَذِيرًۭا ۖ وَلَا تُسْـَٔلُ عَنْ أَصْحَٰبِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: Surely We have sent you with the truth, as a bringer of good news and a warner. You will not be questioned about the companions of the Furnace.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا أَرْسَلْنَٰكَ بِالْحَقِّ بَشِيراٗ وَنَذِيراٗۖ وَلَا تَسْـَٔلْ عَنْ أَصْحَٰبِ اِ۬لْجَحِيمِۖ
canonical_variants.english: We have indeed sent you with the truth as a herald of glad tidings and as a warner, so do not ask about the fellows of purgatory.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَٰكَ بِالْحَقِّ بَشِيراٗ وَنَذِيراٗۖ وَلَا تَسْـَٔلْ عَنَ اَصْحَٰبِ اِ۬لْجَحِيمِۖ
canonical_variants.english: We have indeed sent you with the truth as a herald of glad tidings and as a warner, so do not ask about the fellows of purgatory.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَن تَرْضَىٰ عَنكَ ٱلْيَهُودُ وَلَا ٱلنَّصَٰرَىٰ حَتَّىٰ تَتَّبِعَ مِلَّتَهُمْ ۗ قُلْ إِنَّ هُدَى ٱللَّهِ هُوَ ٱلْهُدَىٰ ۗ وَلَئِنِ ٱتَّبَعْتَ أَهْوَآءَهُم بَعْدَ ٱلَّذِى جَآءَكَ مِنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ ۙ مَا لَكَ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مِن وَلِىٍّۢ وَلَا نَصِيرٍ
verses.text: Neither the Jews nor the Christians will ever be pleased with you until you follow their creed. Say: ‘Surely the guidance of God – it is the (true) guidance.’ If indeed you follow their (vain) desires, after the knowledge which has come to you, you will have no ally and no helper against God.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ءَاتَيْنَٰهُمُ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ يَتْلُونَهُۥ حَقَّ تِلَاوَتِهِۦٓ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ ۗ وَمَن يَكْفُرْ بِهِۦ فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْخَٰسِرُونَ
verses.text: Those to whom We have given the Book recite it as it should be recited. Those (people) believe in it. But whoever disbelieves in it – those (people) – they are the losers.

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَنِّى فَضَّلْتُكُمْ عَلَى ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Sons of Israel! Remember My blessing which I bestowed on you, and that I have favored you over the worlds.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًۭا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍۢ شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌۭ وَلَا تَنفَعُهَا شَفَٰعَةٌۭ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: Guard (yourselves) against a Day when no one will intercede for another at all, and no compensation will be accepted from him, and no intercession will benefit him, nor will they be helped.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَإِذِ ٱبْتَلَىٰٓ إِبْرَٰهِۦمَ رَبُّهُۥ بِكَلِمَٰتٍۢ فَأَتَمَّهُنَّ ۖ قَالَ إِنِّى جَاعِلُكَ لِلنَّاسِ إِمَامًۭا ۖ قَالَ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِى ۖ قَالَ لَا يَنَالُ عَهْدِى ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: (Remember) when his Lord tested Abraham with (certain) words, and he fulfilled them. He said, ‘Surely I am going to make you a leader for the people.’ He said, ‘And of my descendants?’ He said, ‘My covenant does not extend to the evildoers.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ جَعَلْنَا ٱلْبَيْتَ مَثَابَةًۭ لِّلنَّاسِ وَأَمْنًۭا وَٱتَّخِذُوا۟ مِن مَّقَامِ إِبْرَٰهِۦمَ مُصَلًّۭى ۖ وَعَهِدْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ إِبْرَٰهِۦمَ وَإِسْمَٰعِيلَ أَن طَهِّرَا بَيْتِىَ لِلطَّآئِفِينَ وَٱلْعَٰكِفِينَ وَٱلرُّكَّعِ ٱلسُّجُودِ
verses.text: And when We made the House a place of meeting and security for the people, and (said), ‘Take the standing place of Abraham as a place of prayer,’ and We made a covenant with Abraham and Ishmael: ‘Both of you purify My House for the ones who go around (it), and the ones who are devoted to it, and the ones who bow, (and) the ones who prostrate themselves.’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذْ جَعَلْنَا اَ۬لْبَيْتَ مَثَابَةٗ لِّلنَّاسِ وَأَمْناٗ وَاتَّخَذُواْ مِن مَّقَامِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ مُصَلّىٗۖ وَعَهِدْنَا إِلَىٰ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسْمَٰعِيلَ أَن طَهِّرَا بَيْتِيَ لِلطَّآئِفِينَ وَالْعَٰكِفِينَ وَالرُّكَّعِ اِ۬لسُّجُودِۖ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when We made the House a resort for mankind, and a sanctuary. And they took from Abraham's standing place a place of prayer. And We covenanted with Abraham and Ishmael, "Cleanse My House for circumambulators and consecrators and those bowing down and prostrating themselves."

canonical_variants.arabic: وَإِذْ جَعَلْنَا اَ۬لْبَيْتَ مَثَابَةٗ لِّلنَّاسِ وَأَمْناٗ وَاتَّخَذُواْ مِن مَّقَامِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ مُصَلّىٗۖ وَعَهِدْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسْمَٰعِيلَ أَن طَهِّرَا بَيْتِيَ لِلطَّآئِفِينَ وَالْعَٰكِفِينَ وَالرُّكَّعِ اِ۬لسُّجُودِۖ
canonical_variants.english: And recall when We made the House a resort for mankind, and a sanctuary. And they took from Abraham's standing place a place of prayer. And We covenanted with Abraham and Ishmael, "Cleanse My House for circumambulators and consecrators and those bowing down and prostrating themselves."

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ إِبْرَٰهِۦمُ رَبِّ ٱجْعَلْ هَٰذَا بَلَدًا ءَامِنًۭا وَٱرْزُقْ أَهْلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرَٰتِ مَنْ ءَامَنَ مِنْهُم بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْءَاخِرِ ۖ قَالَ وَمَن كَفَرَ فَأُمَتِّعُهُۥ قَلِيلًۭا ثُمَّ أَضْطَرُّهُۥٓ إِلَىٰ عَذَابِ ٱلنَّارِ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: And when Abraham said, ‘My Lord, make this land secure, and provide its people with fruits – whoever of them who believes in God and the Last Day,’ He said, ‘And whoever disbelieves – I shall give him enjoyment (of life) for a little (while), (and) then I shall force him to the punishment of the Fire – and it is an evil destination!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ يَرْفَعُ إِبْرَٰهِۦمُ ٱلْقَوَاعِدَ مِنَ ٱلْبَيْتِ وَإِسْمَٰعِيلُ رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّآ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: And when Abraham raised up the foundations of the House, and Ishmael (with him): ‘Our Lord, accept (this) from us. Surely You – You are the Hearing, the Knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: رَبَّنَا وَٱجْعَلْنَا مُسْلِمَيْنِ لَكَ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِنَآ أُمَّةًۭ مُّسْلِمَةًۭ لَّكَ وَأَرِنَا مَنَاسِكَنَا وَتُبْ عَلَيْنَآ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: Our Lord, make us both submitted to You, and (make) from our descendants a community submitted to You. And show us our rituals, and turn to us (in forgiveness). Surely You – You are the One who turns (in forgiveness), the Compassionate.

verses.quran_arabic: رَبَّنَا وَٱبْعَثْ فِيهِمْ رَسُولًۭا مِّنْهُمْ يَتْلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَٰتِكَ وَيُعَلِّمُهُمُ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ وَٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَيُزَكِّيهِمْ ۚ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: Our Lord, raise up among them a messenger from among them, to recite Your signs to them, and to teach them the Book and the wisdom, and to purify them. Surely You – You are the Mighty, the Wise.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَن يَرْغَبُ عَن مِّلَّةِ إِبْرَٰهِۦمَ إِلَّا مَن سَفِهَ نَفْسَهُۥ ۚ وَلَقَدِ ٱصْطَفَيْنَٰهُ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَإِنَّهُۥ فِى ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ لَمِنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: Who prefers (another creed) to the creed of Abraham except the one who makes a fool of himself? Certainly We have chosen him in this world, and surely in the Hereafter he will indeed be among the righteous.

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُۥ رَبُّهُۥٓ أَسْلِمْ ۖ قَالَ أَسْلَمْتُ لِرَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: When his Lord said to him, ‘Submit!,’ he said, ‘I have submitted to the Lord of the worlds.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَوَصَّىٰ بِهَآ إِبْرَٰهِۦمُ بَنِيهِ وَيَعْقُوبُ يَٰبَنِىَّ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ ٱصْطَفَىٰ لَكُمُ ٱلدِّينَ فَلَا تَمُوتُنَّ إِلَّا وَأَنتُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
verses.text: And Abraham charged his sons with this, and Jacob (did too): ‘My sons! Surely God has chosen the (true) religion for you, so do not die without submitting.’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَوْصَىٰ بِهَا إِبْرَٰهِيمُ بَنِيهِۖ وَيَعْقُوبُ يَٰبَنِيَّ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ اَ۪صْطَفَىٰ لَكُمُ اُ۬لدِّينَ فَلَا تَمُوتُنَّ إِلَّا وَأَنتُم مُّسْلِمُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And with this Abraham enjoined his children, and (so did) Jacob, "O my children, Allah has indeed chosen the religion for you, so do not die except as Muslims."

canonical_variants.arabic: وَأَوْص۪ىٰ بِهَآ إِبْرَٰهِيمُ بَنِيهِۖ وَيَعْقُوبُ يَٰبَنِيَّ إِنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ اَ۪صْطَف۪ىٰ لَكُمُ اُ۬لدِّينَ فَلَا تَمُوتُنَّ إِلَّا وَأَنتُم مُّسْلِمُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And with this Abraham enjoined his children, and (so did) Jacob, "O my children, Allah has indeed chosen the religion for you, so do not die except as Muslims."

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ كُنتُمْ شُهَدَآءَ إِذْ حَضَرَ يَعْقُوبَ ٱلْمَوْتُ إِذْ قَالَ لِبَنِيهِ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ مِنۢ بَعْدِى قَالُوا۟ نَعْبُدُ إِلَٰهَكَ وَإِلَٰهَ ءَابَآئِكَ إِبْرَٰهِۦمَ وَإِسْمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسْحَٰقَ إِلَٰهًۭا وَٰحِدًۭا وَنَحْنُ لَهُۥ مُسْلِمُونَ
verses.text: Or were you witnesses when death approached Jacob, when he said to his sons, ‘What will you serve after me?’ They said, ‘We will serve your God, and the God of your fathers, Abraham, and Ishmael, and Isaac: one God – to Him we submit.’

verses.quran_arabic: تِلْكَ أُمَّةٌۭ قَدْ خَلَتْ ۖ لَهَا مَا كَسَبَتْ وَلَكُم مَّا كَسَبْتُمْ ۖ وَلَا تُسْـَٔلُونَ عَمَّا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: That community has passed away. To it what it has earned, and to you what you have earned. You will not be questioned about what they have done.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ كُونُوا۟ هُودًا أَوْ نَصَٰرَىٰ تَهْتَدُوا۟ ۗ قُلْ بَلْ مِلَّةَ إِبْرَٰهِۦمَ حَنِيفًۭا ۖ وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
verses.text: They say, ‘Be Jews or Christians, (and then) you will be (rightly) guided.’ Say: ‘No! The creed of Abraham the Ḥanīf. He was not one of the idolaters.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُولُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْنَا وَمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَىٰٓ إِبْرَٰهِۦمَ وَإِسْمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسْحَٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ وَٱلْأَسْبَاطِ وَمَآ أُوتِىَ مُوسَىٰ وَعِيسَىٰ وَمَآ أُوتِىَ ٱلنَّبِيُّونَ مِن رَّبِّهِمْ لَا نُفَرِّقُ بَيْنَ أَحَدٍۢ مِّنْهُمْ وَنَحْنُ لَهُۥ مُسْلِمُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘We believe in God, and what has been sent down to us, and what has been sent down to Abraham, and Ishmael, and Isaac, and Jacob, and the tribes, and what was given to Moses and Jesus, and what was given to the prophets from their Lord. We make no distinction between any of them, and to Him we submit.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِنْ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِمِثْلِ مَآ ءَامَنتُم بِهِۦ فَقَدِ ٱهْتَدَوا۟ ۖ وَّإِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ فَإِنَّمَا هُمْ فِى شِقَاقٍۢ ۖ فَسَيَكْفِيكَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: If they believe in something like what you believe in, they have been (rightly) guided, but if they turn away, they are only in defiance. God will be sufficient for you against them. He is the Hearing, the Knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: صِبْغَةَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ وَمَنْ أَحْسَنُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ صِبْغَةًۭ ۖ وَنَحْنُ لَهُۥ عَٰبِدُونَ
verses.text: The dye(ing) of God, and who is better than God at dye(ing)? We serve Him.

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ أَتُحَآجُّونَنَا فِى ٱللَّهِ وَهُوَ رَبُّنَا وَرَبُّكُمْ وَلَنَآ أَعْمَٰلُنَا وَلَكُمْ أَعْمَٰلُكُمْ وَنَحْنُ لَهُۥ مُخْلِصُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘Do you dispute with us about God, when He is our Lord and your Lord? To us our deeds and to you your deeds. We are devoted to Him.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ تَقُولُونَ إِنَّ إِبْرَٰهِۦمَ وَإِسْمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسْحَٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ وَٱلْأَسْبَاطَ كَانُوا۟ هُودًا أَوْ نَصَٰرَىٰ ۗ قُلْ ءَأَنتُمْ أَعْلَمُ أَمِ ٱللَّهُ ۗ وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّن كَتَمَ شَهَٰدَةً عِندَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Or do you say, “Abraham, and Ishmael, and Isaac, and Jacob, and the tribes were Jews or Christians”?’ Say: ‘Do you know better, or God? Who is more evil than the one who conceals a testimony which he has from God? God is not oblivious of what you do.’

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ إِبۡرَٰهِـۧمَ وَإِسۡمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ وَاَلۡأَسۡبَاطَ كَانُواْ هُودًا أَوۡ نَصَٰر۪يٰۗ قُلۡ ءَٰا۬نتُمۡ أَعۡلَمُ أَمِ اِ۬للَّهُۗ وَمَنۡ أَظۡلَمُ مِمَّن كَتَمَ شَهَٰدَةً عِندَهُۥ مِنَ اَ۬للَّهِۗ وَمَا اَ۬للَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do they say that Abraham and Ishmael and Isaac and Jacob and the Grandsons were Jews or Christians? Say, "Do you know better or Allah?" And who is more unjust than one who conceals a testimony he has from Allah? For Allah is not oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ إِبۡرَٰهِـۧمَ وَإِسۡمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ  وَاَلۡأَسۡبَاطَ كَانُواْ هُودًا أَوۡ نَصَٰر۪يٰۗ قُلۡ ءَٰا۬نتُمۡ أَعۡلَمُ أَمِ  اِ۬للَّهُۗ وَمَنۡ أَظۡلَم مِّمَّن كَتَمَ شَهَٰدَةً عِندَهُۥ مِنَ اَ۬للَّهِۗ وَمَا اَ۬للَّهُ  بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do they say that Abraham and Ishmael and Isaac and Jacob and the Grandsons were Jews or Christians? Say, "Do you know better or Allah?" And who is more unjust than one who conceals a testimony he has from Allah? For Allah is not oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ إِبۡرَٰهِـۧمَ وَإِسۡمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ وَٱلۡأَسۡبَاطَ كَانُواْ هُودًا أَوۡ نَصَٰرَىٰۗ قُلۡ ءَأَنتُمۡ أَعۡلَمُ أَمِ ٱللَّهُۗ وَمَنۡ أَظۡلَمُ مِمَّن كَتَمَ شَهَٰدَةً عِندَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do they say that Abraham and Ishmael and Isaac and Jacob and the Grandsons were Jews or Christians? Say, "Do you know better or Allah?" And who is more unjust than one who conceals a testimony he has from Allah? For Allah is not oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ تَقُولُونَ إِنَّ إِبۡرَٰهِـۧمَ وَإِسۡمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ وَٱلۡأَسۡبَاطَ كَانُواْ هُودًا أَوۡ نَصَٰرَىٰۗ قُلۡ ءَأَنتُمۡ أَعۡلَمُ أَمِ ٱللَّهُۗ وَمَنۡ أَظۡلَمُ مِمَّن كَتَمَ شَهَٰدَةً عِندَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do you say that Abraham and Ishmael and Isaac and Jacob and the Grandsons were Jews or Christians? Say, "Do you know better or Allah?" And who is more unjust than one who conceals a testimony he has from Allah? For Allah is not oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسۡمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ وَٱلۡأَسۡبَاطَ كَانُواْ هُودًا أَوۡ نَصَٰرَىٰۗ قُلۡ ءَا۬نتُمُۥ أَعۡلَمُ أَمِ ٱللَّهُۗ وَمَنۡ أَظۡلَمُ مِمَّن كَتَمَ شَهَٰدَةً عِندَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do they say that Abraham and Ishmael and Isaac and Jacob and the Grandsons were Jews or Christians? Say, "Do you know better or Allah?" And who is more unjust than one who conceals a testimony he has from Allah? For Allah is not oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمۡ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ إِبۡرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسۡمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسۡحَٰقَ وَيَعۡقُوبَ وَٱلۡأَسۡبَاطَ كَانُواْ هُودًا أَوۡ نَصَٰرَىٰۗ قُلۡ ءَا۬نتُمُۥ أَعۡلَمُ أَمِ ٱللَّهُۗ وَمَنۡ أَظۡلَمُ مِمَّن كَتَمَ شَهَٰدَةً عِندَهُۥ مِنَ ٱللَّهِۗ وَمَا ٱللَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعۡمَلُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Or do they say that Abraham and Ishmael and Isaac and Jacob and the Grandsons were Jews or Christians? Say, "Do you know better or Allah?" And who is more unjust than one who conceals a testimony he has from Allah? For Allah is not oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسْمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسْحَٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ وَالْأَسْبَاطَ كَانُواْ هُوداً أَوْ نَصَٰرَىٰۖ قُلْ ءَٰا۬نتُمْ أَعْلَمُ أَمِ اِ۬للَّهُۖ وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّن كَتَمَ شَهَٰدَةً عِندَهُۥ مِنَ اَ۬للَّهِۖ وَمَا اَ۬للَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: Or do they say that Abraham and Ishmael and Isaac and Jacob and the Grandsons were Jews or Christians? Say, "Do you know better or Allah?" And who is more unjust than one who conceals a testimony he has from Allah? For Allah is not oblivious of what you do.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسْمَٰعِيلَ وَإِسْحَٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ وَالَاسْبَاطَ كَانُواْ هُوداً اَوْ نَصَٰر۪ىٰۖ قُلَ آٰنتُمُۥٓ أَعْلَمُ أَمِ اِ۬للَّهُۖ وَمَنَ اَظْلَمُ مِمَّن كَتَمَ شَهَٰدَةً عِندَهُۥ مِنَ اَ۬للَّهِۖ وَمَا اَ۬للَّهُ بِغَٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَۖ
